Get more done with JAX, your new AI financial superagent
While you are working in Xero, JAX takes care of routine tasks and delivers actionable insights so you can focus on growing your business. With JAX you can:
Included
Get answers to your business questions with access to real-time public information.
Included
Explore your financial data with instant, easy-to-understand answers.
Included
Automate tasks like create and send quotes and invoices with JAX in Xero, WhatsApp, SMS and email.

Cookie notice
We use cookies to run our websites, personalize your experience, and deliver relevant advertising. Learn more in our notices:
cookie notice
privacy notice
Do Not Sell or Share My Personal Information
Reject Non-Essential
Accept All
Your Global Privacy Control signal has been honored, and you have been opted out of the sale or sharing of your personal information.
Cookie settings
We use cookies and similar technologies on our websites and apps. Click on the different category headings below to find out more and change your choices. Blocking some types of these technologies may impact your experience on our websites and apps, and the services we are able to offer. Find out more in our notices:
cookie notice
privacy notice
Allow all cookies
Manage Consent Preferences
Functional Cookies
Functional Cookies
These cookies enable the website to provide enhanced functionality and personalisation. They may be set by us or by third party providers whose services we have added to our pages. If you do not allow these cookies then some or all of these services may not function properly.
Performance Cookies
Performance Cookies
These cookies allow us to count visits and traffic sources so we can measure and improve the performance of our site. They help us to know which pages are the most and least popular and see how visitors move around the site. All information these cookies collect is aggregated and therefore anonymous. If you do not allow these cookies we will not know when you have visited our site, and will not be able to monitor its performance.
Strictly Necessary Cookies
Always Active
These cookies are necessary for the website to function and cannot be switched off in our systems. They are usually only set in response to actions made by you which amount to a request for services, such as setting your privacy preferences, logging in or filling in forms. You can set your browser to block or alert you about these cookies, but some parts of the site will not then work. These cookies do not store any personally identifiable information.
Targeting Cookies
Targeting Cookies
These cookies may be set through our site by our advertising partners. They may be used by those companies to build a profile of your interests and show you relevant adverts on other sites. They do not store directly personal information, but are based on uniquely identifying your browser and internet device. If you do not allow these cookies, you will experience less targeted advertising.

Pricing plan details and offer terms
Xero reserves the right to change pricing at any time. All prices are listed in USD and do not include applicable taxes. Taxes will be calculated based on your billing address before you enter your payment information. Your monthly recurring total will be updated accordingly in the following steps. Xero subscriptions auto-renew monthly until they are cancelled. If you later decide to change to a less expensive plan you can do so 1 month after upgrading.
*New customers get 80% off for the first 3 months, then Xero’s regular price will apply and auto-renew monthly until cancelled. Only available to customers in the United States purchasing their first organization on xero.com using code DC8032614GL. Discount applies to base Early, Growing, Established plan subscriptions and does not apply to any additional charges for add‑ons, usage and payment fees, unless otherwise specified. This offer cannot be used with, or exchanged for, any other offer. Xero can change or cancel this offer at any time.
†Invoice limits for the Early plan apply to both approving and sending invoices. Transactions initiated by app partners may automatically contribute to your invoice limit.
^Payment fees apply to the use of online invoice payments. See
here
for more information.
**Median payment times of invoices with a payment service included and sent via SMS by customers using Xero in US from 9/1/2024 to 3/31/2025 (compared to invoices sent by email and without payment service included).
a. †† Standard ACH payments are included in your Xero plan (fees apply for other payment methods). Any payment fees are in addition to your Xero monthly subscription amount and are not eligible for subscription discounts and offers. Fees exclude applicable taxes. See
here
for more information.
b. ^Payment fees apply to the use of online invoice payments. See
here
for more information.
See our terms of use for details
Hubdoc terms of use

See our terms of use for details
Hubdoc terms of use
Why choose Xero vs QuickBooks?
Xero's user friendly layout, collaborative features and US-based team make it the ideal Quickbooks alternative to switch to.
Compare Xero vs. QuickBooks
.
1
Tap to pay, mobile payments your way
Accept payments on the go with tap-to-pay functionality on both Android and iPhone - a feature QuickBooks can’t match.
2
Powerful business insights
Get visually rich, easy-to-understand analytics with Syft - available on all Xero plans to help make smarter decisions.
3
Free personalized onboarding support
Kickstart your Xero journey with free, personalized onboarding from a Xero Coach for your first 90 days.
Gusto payroll plays nice with Xero
Use Gusto payroll to calculate pay and deductions, pay employees, simplify compliance, and update the Xero accounts.
Learn more about Gusto
Zero setup stress, free onboarding with a Xero Coach.
Sign up and get access to a real human who’ll help you set up Xero, connect your bank feeds, and turn your cash-flow and analytics dashboards into a clear view of your whole business.
Learn more about Xero coaches
Frequently asked questions
How does the one month free work?
Purchase any Xero plan and your first month will be free. Your free month begins once you finalize your business and set up in Xero. You will receive a reminder 7 days before your free month ends and then you will be charged for your second month and onwards. Xero subscriptions auto-renew monthly until they are cancelled.
Get Xero one month for free
Purchase any Xero plan and your first month will be free. Your free month begins once you finalize your business and set up in Xero. You will receive a reminder 7 days before your free month ends and then you will be charged for your second month and onwards. Xero subscriptions auto-renew monthly until they are cancelled.
Get Xero one month for free
Can I pay the subscription annually?
You'll receive your invoice at the end of your monthly billing period. Payment will be taken on the date shown on your invoice using the payment details entered when you purchased your subscription.If you’ve incurred usage charges for Xero Payroll, Xero Projects or Xero Expenses – or you have a chargeable direct bank feed – these charges will be invoiced for the previous month.
You'll receive your invoice at the end o

They do not store directly personal information, but are based on uniquely identifying your browser and internet device. If you do not allow these cookies, you will experience less targeted advertising.

Cookie notice
We use cookies to run our websites, personalize your experience, and deliver relevant advertising. Learn more in our notices:
cookie notice
privacy notice
Do Not Sell or Share My Personal Information
Reject Non-Essential
Accept All
Your Global Privacy Control signal has been honored, and you have been opted out of the sale or sharing of your personal information.
Cookie settings
We use cookies and similar technologies on our websites and apps. Click on the different category headings below to find out more and change your choices. Blocking some types of these technologies may impact your experience on our websites and apps, and the services we are able to offer. Find out more in our notices:
cookie notice
privacy notice
Allow all cookies
Manage Consent Preferences
Functional Cookies
Functional Cookies
These cookies enable the website to provide enhanced functionality and personalisation. They may be set by us or by third party providers whose services we have added to our pages. If you do not allow these cookies then some or all of these services may not function properly.
Performance Cookies
Performance Cookies
These cookies allow us to count visits and traffic sources so we can measure and improve the performance of our site. They help us to know which pages are the most and least popular and see how visitors move around the site. All information these cookies collect is aggregated and therefore anonymous. If you do not allow these cookies we will not know when you have visited our site, and will not be able to monitor its performance.
Strictly Necessary Cookies
Always Active
These cookies are necessary for the website to function and cannot be switched off in our systems. They are usually only set in response to actions made by you which amount to a request for services, such as setting your privacy preferences, logging in or filling in forms. You can set your browser to block or alert you about these cookies, but some parts of the site will not then work. These cookies do not store any personally identifiable information.
Targeting Cookies
Targeting Cookies
These cookies may be set through our site by our advertising partners. They may be used by those companies to build a profile of your interests and show you relevant adverts on other sites. They do not store directly personal information, but are based on uniquely identifying your browser and internet device. If you do not allow these cookies, you will experience less targeted advertising.

analysis.name: Xero
analysis.tagline: Know your numbers. Control your cash flow.
analysis.value_proposition: Cloud accounting software for small businesses that automates invoicing, bank reconciliation, and reporting with no per-user fees.
analysis.ideal_customer: Small business owners who want straightforward cloud accounting without per-seat pricing, and the accountants/bookkeepers who serve them

features.name: online invoicing
features.description: Create, send, and automate reminders for online invoices
features.evidence_quote: Automated invoices, online payments, and real-time reporting to save you time.

features.name: quotes
features.description: Send quotes to customers that can be converted to invoices

features.name: invoice limits (early plan)
features.description: Early plan capped at 20 outbound invoices per month
features.evidence_quote: Send quotes and up to 20 invoices†

features.name: accept online payments
features.description: Accept online invoice payments from customers via integrated payment gateways

features.name: bill entry
features.description: Enter supplier bills into accounts payable; Early plan limited to 5 bills/month
features.evidence_quote: Enter bills / Enter up to 5 bills

features.name: online bill payments
features.description: Pay supplier bills directly online from within Xero

features.name: bank reconciliation
features.description: Match bank transactions against accounting records

features.name: auto-reconcile bank transactions
features.description: Automated bank transaction matching using rules (currently in Beta)

features.name: bank connections
features.description: Connect bank accounts for automatic transaction feed import

features.name: bill and receipt capture
features.description: Digitally capture bills and receipts via Hubdoc for paperless record-keeping

features.name: hubdoc data capture
features.description: Pull bills and receipts into Xero automatically with Hubdoc
features.evidence_quote: Pull bills and receipts into Xero automatically with Hubdoc.

features.name: real-time reporting
features.description: View up-to-date financial reports in real time

features.name: sales tax management
features.description: Calculate and track sales tax across transactions

features.name: w-9 and 1099 management
features.description: Collect W-9 forms and generate 1099 reports for US contractors

features.name: cash flow forecasting
features.description: Short-term cash flow forecast; 30 days (Early), 60 days (Growing), 180 days (Established)
features.evidence_quote: 30 day cash flow forecast / 60 day cash flow forecast / 180 day cash flow forecast

features.name: performance visualization
features.description: Graphs and charts for visualizing financial performance; basic in Early, full in Growing+
features.evidence_quote: Visualize performance with graphs / Basic financial performance visualisation

features.name: performance dashboards
features.description: Customizable dashboards for monitoring financial performance KPIs

features.name: financial health scorecards
features.description: Tailored scorecards showing business financial health metrics

features.name: kpi and ratio analysis
features.description: Analyze key financial KPIs and ratios for deeper business insights

features.name: multi-currency
features.description: Manage transactions, invoices, and reports in multiple currencies

features.name: project tracking
features.description: Track time, costs, and profitability at the project level

features.name: expense claims
features.description: Employee expense claim submission, approval, and reimbursement workflow

features.name: payroll
features.description: Run payroll and manage employee pay; available as feature or add-on

features.name: inventory plus
features.description: Advanced inventory management available as an optional paid add-on ($39/month)
features.evidence_quote: Inventory Plus (first month free, then $39 per month)

features.name: invoice reminders
features.description: Automated reminders sent to customers with outstanding invoices
features.evidence_quote: From reconciling bank transactions to sending invoice reminders, Xero works for you.

features.name: jax ai financial superagent
features.description: AI agent that answers business questions, explores financial data, and automates routine tasks
features.evidence_quote: Get more done with JAX, your new AI financial superagent

features.name: jax chat automation
features.description: Create and send quotes/invoices via conversational AI in Xero, WhatsApp, SMS, and email
features.evidence_quote: Automate tasks like create and send quotes and invoices with JAX in Xero, WhatsApp, SMS and email.

features.name: jax real-time public information access
features.description: JAX can answer business questions using real-time public information
features.evidence_quote: Get answers to your business questions with access to real-time public information.

features.name: no per-user fees
features.description: All plans include unlimited users at no extra per-seat charge

features.name: cloud accounting
features.description: Fully cloud-based accounting with secure data storage and access from anywhere
features.evidence_quote: Centralize your finances with safe and secure cloud accounting software.

features.name: 24/7 online support
features.description: Round-the-clock online customer support included with all plans

features.name: xero coaches onboarding
features.description: Access to onboarding specialists during first 90 days of subscription

features.name: xero accounting mobile app
features.description: Mobile app for managing accounting on the go

features.name: xero app store
features.description: Marketplace to find, try, and buy third-party business apps that integrate with Xero
features.evidence_quote: Find, try and buy business apps that connect with Xero.

features.name: xero hq
features.description: Practice management hub for accountants to manage clients and staff in one place
features.evidence_quote: Xero HQ - Clients and staff in one place

features.name: xero practice manager
features.description: Workflow and practice management tool for accounting firms
features.evidence_quote: Xero Practice Manager - Manage your practice efficiently

features.name: xero workpapers
features.description: Compliance workflow management for accountants doing audit/compliance work

features.name: xero cashbook and ledger
features.description: Starter accounting plans for smaller clients managed by accountant/bookkeeper partners
features.evidence_quote: Xero Cashbook & Ledger - A starter for smaller clients

features.name: syft analytics
features.description: Advanced reporting, forecasting, and analytics integration for accountants

features.name: partner program
features.description: Program for accountants/bookkeepers granting free Xero access, training, certification, discounts
features.evidence_quote: Join and get Xero free / Become a Xero expert / Get discounts and rewards

features.name: xero certification
features.description: Official certification program for accountants and bookkeepers to become Xero experts

features.name: industry-specific solutions
features.description: Tailored features and guidance for construction, real estate, retail, and other verticals
features.evidence_quote: See how Xero can help businesses in your industry.

features.name: trend analysis
features.description: Identify financial trends to support business decision-making
features.evidence_quote: Make confident business decisions with trend analysis and simple, customizable reporting.

features.name: customizable reporting
features.description: Customizable financial reports for business performance monitoring

differentiators: No per-user license fees on any plan
JAX AI financial superagent with WhatsApp, SMS, and email task automation
250,000+ accountants and bookkeepers on the platform
Xero App Store ecosystem with hundreds of third-party integrations
Dedicated Xero Coaches for onboarding support during first 90 days
Full practice management suite for accountants (Xero HQ, Practice Manager, Workpapers)
Free access to Xero for accountant/bookkeeper partners

tiers.name: Early
tiers.headline_inclusions: Up to 20 invoices/month, up to 5 bills/month, bank reconciliation, 30-day cash flow forecast

tiers.name: Growing
tiers.headline_inclusions: Unlimited invoices and bills, auto-reconciliation (Beta), dashboards, health scorecards, 60-day forecast

tiers.name: Established
tiers.headline_inclusions: All Growing features plus multi-currency, project tracking, expense claims, KPI analysis, 180-day forecast

pricing.notes: 80% off first 3 months promotional pricing active at time of scrape ($5/$11/$18). Inventory Plus add-on $39/month (first month free). No per-user fees on any plan. No permanent free tier; one month free offered with plan purchase as promotion. Monthly billing; cancel with one month's notice.
